creator: jessefrgsmith@yahoo.ca
text:
New port: games/searchandrescue-data

The attached port provides the data files needed for the SearchAndRescue
flight simulator. The "shar" output of the port is included in the Fix field below.

Fix: # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may 
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and 
# have default permissions.                                          
#                                                                    
# This archive contains:                                             
#                                                                    
#       SAR-data/                                                    
#       SAR-data/Makefile                                            
#       SAR-data/pkg-descr                                           
#       SAR-data/pkg-plist                                           
#       SAR-data/distinfo                                            
#                                                                    
echo c - SAR-data/                                                   
mkdir -p SAR-data/ > /dev/null 2>&1                                  
echo x - SAR-data/Makefile                                           
sed 's/^X//' >SAR-data/Makefile << 'abb7c5b7ab85c58b2327f3ea34590a11'
X# New port makefile for searchandrescue-data                        
X# Date: June 30, 2010                                               
X# Whom: Jesse Smith                                                 
X#                                                                   
X# $FreeBSD$                                                         
X#                                                                   
X                                                                    
XPORTNAME=      SearchAndRescue-data                                 
XPORTVERSION=   1.0.0                                                
XCATEGORIES=    games                                                
XMASTER_SITES=  SF/searchandrescue/Data_Files/                       
X                                                                    
XDISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}                           
XMAINTAINER=    jessefrgsmith@yahoo.ca                               
XCOMMENT=       The data files for SearchAndRescue flight simulator. 
X                                                                    
XNO_BUILD=      YES                                                  
X# NO_INSTALL=  YES                                                  
X                                                                    
Xdo-install:                                                         
X       mkdir ${PREFIX}/share/games/searchandrescue/                 
X       cd ${WRKDIR} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${PREFIX}/share/games/searchandrescue
X       find ${PREFIX}/share/games/searchandrescue/ -maxdepth 1 -type f -name ."*" -exec chmod 644 {} \;                                                          
X       find ${PREFIX}/share/games/searchandrescue/ -maxdepth 1 -type f -name ."*" -exec rm {} \;                                                                 
X                                                                                
X.include <bsd.port.mk>                                                          
X                                                                                
abb7c5b7ab85c58b2327f3ea34590a11                                                 
echo x - SAR-data/pkg-descr                                                      
sed 's/^X//' >SAR-data/pkg-descr << 'c4113e79a32e2c7a3c471f382ec0f7a7'           
XThis port contains the data files the SearchAndRescue flight simulator needs.   
X                                                                                
XWWW: http://searchandrescue.sourceforge.net/                                    
X                                                                                
c4113e79a32e2c7a3c471f382ec0f7a7                                                 
echo x - SAR-data/pkg-plist                                                      
sed 's/^X//' >SAR-data/pkg-plist << '04c01c87b2fff53f3970a8e835571f53'
